creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Jarrod Sayers, 15.10.08, 10:00h CEST:

> I've delayed this temporarily until the Nagios Plugins port has been  
> updated, PR should be in later this evening.

OK, can you please reference the PR with the update in a followup to this
PR once you sent it so its progress can be watched?

Regards,
Stefan
